neighborhoods.name: Annandale / Little River Turnpike
neighborhoods.description: Korean restaurant district along Little River Turnpike with mixed commercial-residential, regional Korean groceries, and bus access to the Beltway

housing.predominantType: Older garden apartments, townhomes, and small commercial-residential mix

neighborhoods.character_notes: The historic and commercial heart of Annandale. Most walkable area with best access to cultural attractions, restaurants, and public services.

neighborhoods.name: Lake Barcroft
neighborhoods.description: Covenant-governed lakeside community with private lake club, beaches, and large-lot mid-century homes
neighborhoods.character_notes: Established residential area offering a quieter lifestyle while maintaining reasonable access to Annandale's center and services.

neighborhoods.name: Bailey's Crossroads / Mason District
neighborhoods.description: Apartment-heavy transit corridor along Columbia Pike and Leesburg Pike with very diverse population and walkable strip retail

housing.predominantType: Garden apartment complexes and condo towers

neighborhoods.character_notes: More affordable option for budget-conscious retirees. May require a car or longer transit times to reach central amenities.

neighborhoods.name: Wakefield / Sleepy Hollow
neighborhoods.description: Established single-family neighborhoods near Wakefield Park and Inova Fairfax Hospital, popular with medical professionals
neighborhoods.character_notes: Family-friendly area with good schools, parks, and community amenities. Popular with active retirees and families.
